Websites that earn trust. Automation that buys back time.

KritRaj Nexera designs precise, fast websites and builds n8n automations that remove the manual work slowing teams down. Two crafts, one standard.

Built with care for
Small Businesses· Startups· Founders· Agencies· Consultants
The Standard

Why teams stay with us.

Fast Communication

We reply the same day, in plain language. No chasing, no status meetings.

Clean Code

Hand-written, documented, and built to be read — by you or the next developer.

Attention to Detail

The 1% most agencies skip is where trust is built.

What We Do

Two services. Done properly.

We don't spread thin. Every project is either a custom website or an n8n automation — and gets our full attention.

View all services →

Custom Website Development

Hand-coded, fast, and built around your offer — not a template. Business sites, landing pages, portfolios, and custom web solutions.

Explore service →

n8n Workflow Automation

Reliable, visible pipelines connecting the tools you already use — leads, CRM, Sheets, email, WhatsApp, and APIs.

Explore service →
How We Work

A clear path, start to launch.

See the full process →
01

Discovery

We learn your business, goals, and what success looks like.

02

Planning

A fixed scope and architecture signed off before any code.

03

Design

Layouts engineered around outcomes, refined in rounds.

04

Development

Hand-coded, tested, reviewed against the standard.

05

Automation

Workflows built, monitored, and documented.

06

Launch

Shipped, verified, and supported after go-live.

Let's build something worth trusting.

Tell us what you're working on. We'll tell you honestly whether we're the right fit — usually within a day.
